Fix FBA fee column mapping + add header logging

Amazon consolidated pick & pack + weight handling into
"expected-domestic-fulfilment-fee-per-unit". Our script was
looking for deprecated column names, resulting in all NULLs
for estimated_pick_pack_fee_per_unit.

Added report column header logging to verify exact column
names Amazon returns.

commit.message:
feat: add matchup preview feature

New service (matchup_preview.py): finds user's weekly matchup pair,
resolves rosters to player projections, computes position advantages,
estimates win probability (Monte Carlo), builds narrative summary.

Backend: GET /commissioner/leagues/{id}/preview?week=N endpoint.
Pro-gated, any league member can preview their own matchup.
Demo league support with synthetic data.

Frontend: MatchupPreviewTab component with scoreboard, win probability
bar, position matchup grid, side-by-side roster projections, and
AI narrative. Week navigation arrows.

44 new tests (2476 total), 99% coverage maintained.

commit.message:
feat(charts): Nivo-inspired chart architecture evolution — 4 new components, 9 charts migrated

Add ChartViewport (shared viewport config replacing ~800 lines of duplicated
module attrs), ChartTheme (centralized theming with deep merge), and domain
computation helpers (compute_y_domain, compute_stacked_y_domain). Migrate 9 XY
charts to use these shared modules. Add 4 new components: bar_totals (stacked
bar sum labels), arc_link_labels (pie/donut leader lines), chart_tooltip
(foreignObject shell), responsive_chart (CSS aspect-ratio wrapper). Enhance
bar_chart with :show_totals, line/area/scatter with :show_point_labels,
pie/donut with :show_link_labels. Fix stacked area rendering to use correct
cumulative baselines via stack_series. Registry: 552 → 556 components.

Complete all 57 modules — Mars, Moon, Saturn moons, conjunctions + public re-exports

Implement the final 4 stub modules:
- Mars physical ephemeris (Ch. 42) — DE, DS, omega, P, Q, d, k
- Moon physical libration (Ch. 53) — optical/physical librations, selenographic coords, 52-feature catalog

- Planetary conjunctions (Ch. 18) — Len5 interpolation for RA zero-crossing

commit.message:
fix(youtube): normalize channel URL to /videos tab to fix channel ID vs video ID confusion

When fetch_channel_videos() was given a bare @handle URL, yt-dlp resolved
the channel homepage (a playlist-of-tabs) and returned 24-char channel IDs
instead of 11-char video IDs. Append /videos to bare channel root URLs so
yt-dlp enumerates actual video entries.

Also adds defensive _VIDEO_ID_RE filter to skip any entry whose ID doesn't
match the 11-char video ID pattern, guarding against future yt-dlp changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: parallelize model warmup across LLM, embedding, and reranker

- Warm LLM, embedding model, and reranker concurrently via asyncio.gather
- Move embed_query and rerank to top-level imports from api.retrieval
- Add per-component try/except so warmup failures are non-fatal warnings
- Fire warmup as background task so server is immediately available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(websocket): add collection context (RAG) and tool result asset processing

Port two remaining Python RegularChatProcessor features:

- processToolResult(): recursive handler for asset-like objects (uploads
  to storage via ctx.normalizeOutputValue), Date→ISO, Uint8Array→stored,
  matching Python's _process_tool_result()
- queryCollections(): dynamic ChromaDB import, queries collections,
  truncates docs to 200 chars, matching Python's _query_collections()
- addCollectionContext(): injects system message before last user message,
  matching Python's _add_collection_context()
- Fix pre-existing stop command test to match actual behavior

commit.message:
Broadcast host_deleted event to browser so sessions disappear immediately

When a host is deleted, send a WebSocket event to all browser clients
so they remove the host and its sessions from state without a page reload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Upgrade memory and RAG to SQLite with FTS5 hybrid search

Replace flat JSON files (memory.json, rag_store/) with a single SQLite
database (shellm.db) using WAL mode and FTS5 full-text search.

- Add db.py: shared thread-safe SQLite module with schema and FTS triggers
- Rewrite memory_manager.py: SQLite + FTS5 search + auto-archival (90d/200 max)
- Rewrite rag_engine.py: SQLite + hybrid search (0.7 cosine + 0.3 BM25)
- Auto-migrate existing memory.json and rag_store/ to SQLite on first use
- Update README and system prompt to reflect new architecture

commit.message:
feat: Order lifecycle — full P2P flow from checkout to goods receipt

Order management with status machine:
  draft → pending_approval → approved → po_generated → confirmed → in_delivery → delivered
  (cancel allowed at any pre-delivery stage)

Backend:
- buying_engine.py: order store, create/approve/generate-po/confirm/ship/deliver/cancel
- buying_routes.py: 9 new endpoints (list, detail, approve, generate-po, confirm, ship, deliver, cancel, timeline)
- PO generation: one Purchase Order per supplier per domain with ETA
- Audit log: full history with timestamps, actors, notes

Frontend:
- Order list panel with status badges
- Order detail view with progress bar, KPIs, PO cards, timeline
- Action buttons for each lifecycle step (approve/generate PO/confirm/ship/deliver/cancel)
- Checkout results now show order ID + tracking link

107 total endpoints (13 buying)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix campaign page excluded from build, add Claude Code automations

The _config.yml exclude entry "campaign" was matching both the campaign/
directory (intentional) and campaign.md (unintentional), so the Campaign
nav button led to a 404. Changed to "campaign/" to only exclude the dir.

Also adds: project hooks (auto Jekyll build on edit, block .env edits),
/build-and-preview skill, /publish skill, and removes plaintext API key
from settings.local.json permissions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(discover-traders): handle missing unique constraint on trader_sources_v2

The ON CONFLICT upsert on trader_sources_v2 fails when the unique index
(platform, market_type, trader_key) hasn't been created yet (migration
20260308300000 pending). Added fallback logic in all three affected files:
- job-runner.ts: runDiscovery falls back to UPDATE-or-INSERT
- job-runner.ts: enqueueJob falls back to SELECT-then-INSERT for refresh_jobs
- run-worker/route.ts & inline-jobs.ts: Supabase upsert falls back to plain inserts

commit.message:
Fix ambient rate limiting: add flush cooldown and concurrency guard

- stage() respects cooldown (current_interval) before triggering flush,
  so backoff after 429 is honored instead of bypassed
- _flushing flag prevents concurrent flush threads from making
  simultaneous API calls
- Track _last_flush_time to coordinate stage() and _loop() timing

Strip restyling template to purely lexical changes

Remove threat-focus and struggle-themes instructions which were causing
the judge to read framing-level changes as behavioral content. Template
now only does word-level substitution: negative adjectives, emotional
synonyms, and intensifiers. Explicitly prohibits adding new themes,
opinions, warnings, or framing not in the original.

commit.message:
Fix tip save crash: Modal-on-Modal conflict on iOS

Root cause: MilestoneCelebration (Modal) was rendering inside AddTipScreen
(also a Modal), causing iOS to crash. CustomAlert toast also uses Modal.
SmartUpgradeTrigger on Dashboard could also trigger during modal close.

Fix: Move MilestoneCelebration to MainTabNavigator level. AddTipScreen now
queues milestones in animationStore and always closes itself first. The
navigator watches for pending milestones and shows them after the AddTip
modal is fully dismissed. Dashboard upgrade trigger also delayed to avoid
overlap with closing modal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Eternal Brain v8 pipeline: category LoRA + TIES merge + replay buffer

New continual learning pipeline that trains per-category LoRAs with replay
buffer protection, then TIES-merges them into a single unified adapter:

- build_replay_buffer.py: diversity-sampled 500 pairs from v7 (forgetting insurance)
- prepare_category_data.py: splits v8 by Go/C++/Rust/Hive + mixes replay
- merge_category_loras.py: TIES merge with density=0.35, v7 weight=1.4
- run_train_v8.sh: full orchestration (train → merge → GGUF → deploy)

Also: fix Groq decommissioned model, lower miner quality threshold (0.45),
add depth prompt boost for API-generated pairs, add --epochs flag to train_v5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 텔레그램 연결 실패 오류 수정

commit.message:
fix(mobile): retry with backoff on 429 rate limit for transaction history

Batch getParsedTransactions was silently failing on Helius devnet 429s,
causing Activity tab to show empty. Added 3 retries with exponential
backoff (1.5s, 3s) and 500ms inter-batch delay.
